title: Tart Cherry Italian Crumble
description: A sweet and tangy Italian dessert made with tart cherries, topped with a crunchy almond crumble.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the cherries and granulated sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour and almonds.
Add the melted butter to the flour mixture and stir until crumbly.
Pour the cherry mixture into a 9-inch baking dish.
Top the cherries with the crumble mixture.
In a small bowl, whisk together the eggs and vanilla extract.
Pour the egg mixture over the crumble.
Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until the crumble is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
Serve warm, topped with whipped cream or vanilla ice cream if desired.
